title: Newsweek: 5 Iran War Scenarios as Trump Weighs Options
snippet: Newsweek analysis presents 5 scenarios: (1) Diplomatic breakthrough — deal on Hormuz + nuclear moratorium, (2) Limited strikes under Sledgehammer — targeted nuclear/military sites, (3) Full-scale assault — comprehensive bombing campaign, (4) Continued stalemate — indefinite blockade/counter-blockade, (5) Regional escalation — Gulf states drawn into direct conflict. The article notes Trump's options are constrained by oil prices, congressional pressure, and Gulf allies' concerns.
tag_reason: 신규 — 5개 시나리오 분석은 현 시점의 전쟁 방향을 체계적으로 정리한 분석 기사
